rationale.R1.2: The artifact has a flagrant logical-flow defect: the related-work paragraph is inserted between two results sections (Table 2 → related work → ImageNet-C → ablation). Improving the draft requires catching and correcting this and any other sequencing breaks.
rationale.R1.3: Revision must preserve the quantitative claims exactly (e.g., ECE 4.7% vs. 12.1%, ObjectNet 7.9% vs. 21.4%); any rewriting that accidentally softens or sharpens these numbers misrepresents the work.
